config.title: Hadeks pozycje karta zw #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choice_list_hli #include "50200" 'section_fclose #include "50222"
function fopen:fopen = std_fopen() section_fopen THIS_FILE end function
function fsave dim bSave: bSave=std_fsave()
if not bSave then section_fsave THIS_FILE end if end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(18, Informacje podstawowe, FORM_SPAN)
QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN_REQ(Produkt,1301,3067,30,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAKLIENT,phkz_pProdukt,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
Ilosc załadowana
QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(3068,30,2,,phkz_curIlosc,4)
QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN_REQ(Dokument magazynowy,1303,3069,30,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAKLIENT,phkz_pDokMag,strNrDok,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
QXF_END
